---
name: release-readiness
description: Review a feature for operational and release readiness including testing evidence rollout notes rollback unresolved risks and hybrid Node and Python runtime readiness.
argument-hint: A feature folder, release candidate, or readiness question.
---

Review the feature artifacts, especially `testing-report.md`, and assess whether the feature is ready for release. Include readiness findings for evidence quality, rollback, operational notes, migration risk, and any unresolved blockers. Use the production-readiness skill and, when appropriate, run the release gate script.
